settings.text_1: "As a dermatologist, I recommend the Red Succinic Acid Pads for those struggling with acne-prone and congested skin. The combination of succinic acid and panthenol effectively helps reduce inflammation, unclog pores, and calm irritation, promoting clearer and healthier skin. Its gentle formula is suitable even for sensitive skin, making it a reliable addition to your skincare routine for maintaining balanced and refreshed skin."
settings.text_2: Share positive thoughts and feedback from your customer.
settings.text_3: Share positive thoughts and feedback from your customer.

settings.heading: Key Benefits
settings.content:
Targeted Acne Control - These peeling pads use Succinic, Salicylic, and Glycolic acids to reduce breakouts and clear skin.

Soothing & Repairing - Infused with Panthenol and Niacinamide, these pads fight acne while soothing redness and promoting even skin tone.

Gentle Yet Effective - Enjoy gentle daily exfoliation that removes dead skin cells and rejuvenates your skin.

Dermatologist-Tested & Safe for Sensitive Skin - Clinically proven non-irritating with a skin-friendly pH of 3.5-5.5, our peeling pads are free from artificial colors and fragrances for healthy skin.

settings.heading: How does it work?
settings.content:
You may use the Red Succinic Acid Pads daily.

They are designed for both morning and evening use as part of your skincare routine. The gentle, exfoliating formula removes dead skin cells and unclogs pores while soothing irritation with ingredients like succinic acid, panthenol, and niacinamide. This combination helps reduce breakouts, calm redness, and promote clearer, healthier skin.

To maximize effectiveness, gently swipe the pad over cleansed skin after washing, then follow with your usual moisturizer and sunscreen in the morning, and as the final step in your evening routine.

settings.heading: Can I use it for sensitive skin?
settings.content: Yes! All skin types, including sensitive skin.

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content:
We do not include any harmful parabens or other nasties. We also NEVER test on animals.

Niacinamide - Helps to reduce redness, aiding in acne management.

Salicylic Acid (BHA) - Exfoliates the skin for effective acne care.

Succinic Acid - Removes dead skin, aiding in acne care.

Panthenol - Removes dead skin, promotes skin turnover, and contributes to smoother skin texture.

settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
settings.content:
We'll cover the cost of Tracked Shipping on all orders.

Processing Time:
Once your order is placed, please allow 24 hours for us to process and prepare your order for shipment.

Shipping Time:
After your order is dispatched, it will typically take 4-8 business days to reach you, depending on your location.

Tracking Information:
Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email containing your tracking number. You can use this to track your package and stay updated on its delivery status.

settings.heading: Return & Exchange Policy
settings.content:
We want you to be fully satisfied with your purchase! If you are not completely happy with your order, we accept returns and exchanges within 60 days from the date of purchase.

Contact us via the website or via email: info@niforashop.com

settings.title: Visible Results After One Use
settings.text: From rough, congested skin to a clear, smooth, and calm complexion—the Red Succinic Acid Pad revitalizes your skin effortlessly. Formulated with succinic acid, salicylic acid (BHA), glycolic acid (AHA), and soothing ingredients like panthenol and niacinamide, it gently exfoliates, reduces breakouts, and soothes irritation, making it perfect even for sensitive skin.

settings.title: Clearer Skin, Fewer Breakouts
settings.text: Discover the Red Succinic Acid Panthenol Pad—formulated with AHA, BHA, and succinic acid to help balance oil, calm irritation, and prevent acne flare-ups. With regular use, it supports clearer, smoother skin by minimizing breakouts and promoting a healthier complexion.

settings.title: Made For All Skin Types
settings.text: Scientifically proven and formulated with non-toxic and non-irritating ingredients, making it suitable even for the most sensitive skin.

settings.title: Reveal a Brighter, More Radiant Complexion
settings.text: The Red Succinic Acid Pad helps reveal a more radiant, even-toned complexion. With niacinamide and gentle exfoliants, it fades dullness and discoloration, leaving your skin visibly brighter and refreshed.

settings.title: Smoother Skin, Refined Texture
settings.text: Powered by gentle exfoliants like AHA and BHA to smooth rough patches and refine uneven skin texture. Just a few swipes a day reveal softer, more polished skin with a renewed, healthy glow.
Clinically selected to Boost Elasticity, Hydration & Glow

settings.title: Low-Molecular Weight Collagen
settings.text: Minimizes pores and increases skin elasticity. Helps restore firmness for a smoother, youthful-looking complexion.

settings.title: Niacinamide
settings.text: Brightens the skin and improves wrinkles. ⁠It also strengthens the skin barrier, helping to reduce redness and uneven tone while smoothing out fine lines for a more even, youthful look.

settings.title: Galactomyces
settings.text: Improves skin tone and texture. Packed with antioxidants, it helps revitalize dull, tired-looking skin and enhances radiance, especially for skin that has lost its youthful glow.

settings.title: Oligo Hyaluronic Acid
settings.text: ⁠Penetrates into deeper layers of the skin to provide hydration. Deep hydration plumps up the skin from within, reducing dryness and the crepey texture that often develops with age.

settings.title: Science Backed Results
settings.text: Each batch of our Zero Pore Pad is rigorously tested to meet dermatological standards, ensuring a safe and effective solution for smoother, clearer, and more refined skin.

settings.question: How often should I use these pads?
settings.answer: They can be used daily—morning and/or evening—depending on your skin's tolerance. If irritation occurs, reduce frequency.

settings.question: What skin types are they suited for?
settings.answer: Formulated for all skin types—especially oily, acne-prone, and sensitive skin. Clinically tested and dermatologist-approved for low irritation.

settings.question: Can they help with breakouts and blackheads?
settings.answer: Yes—ingredients like salicylic, glycolic, and succinic acids work to clear pores, control oil, and reduce breakouts.

settings.question: Do they brighten skin tone?
settings.answer: Absolutely—users report brighter, more even skin with reduced post-acne marks after 4 weeks of consistent use.

settings.question: Are they hydrating or drying?
settings.answer: They're hydrating, thanks to panthenol and niacinamide, which soothe irritation and support a healthy skin barrier.

settings.question: Will these pads help reduce redness and inflammation?
settings.answer: Yes—panthenol and niacinamide in the formula help soothe the skin, reduce redness, and strengthen the skin barrier.

settings.question: Does it have a fragrance?
settings.answer: Water, glycerin, propylene glycol, betaine, sodium carrageenan, polyurethane-35, glucomannan, 1,2-hexanediol, hydroxyacetophenone, butylene glycol, hydroxyethylcellulose, pentylene glycol, dipotassium glycyrrhizate, panthenol, potassium chloride, allantoin, tocopheryl acetate (vitamin E), niacinamide (vitamin B3), hydrolyzed collagen, hydrolyzed sodium hyaluronate, sodium hyaluronate, hydroxyphenyl propamidobenzoic acid, Glycyrrhiza Uralensis (licorice) root extract, Tremella Fuciformis (snow mushroom) extract, fructose, Centella Asiatica extract, phosphatidylcholine, phenoxyethanol, ceramide NP, copper tripeptide-1, beta-sitosterol, beta-glucan, sodium stearoyl glutamate, ethylhexylglycerin, caprylhydroxamic acid, acetyl hexapeptide-8, palmitoyl tripeptide-5.

settings.question: 100% Money back-guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer a 100% money-back guarantee. If you don’t notice healthier skin, we’ll give you a full refund. Plus, enjoy our 60-day risk-free guarantee for peace of mind.
